summary: The diff implements the frontend components (InAppBrowser, SearchInterface, useSearch hook, CSS, Tailwind config) satisfying REQ-2 through REQ-5. However, REQ-1 (the Motoko backend actor in backend/main.mo) is entirely absent from the diff — no backend file was added or modified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement a Motoko backend actor that performs HTTP outcalls to the DuckDuckGo API to fetch search results, parses and returns the JSON response, and handles HTTP errors gracefully with descriptive error messages.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend/main.mo file (or any Motoko file) appears in the diff. The diff only modifies frontend files. None of the acceptance criteria for REQ-1 (exposed search function, HTTP outcall to DuckDuckGo, error handling, raw JSON return) can be verified.

hallucinated_features.description: urlFormatter utility with linkifyText and isUrl functions
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a URL-linkification utility or a urlFormatter module. This utility was added beyond the stated requirements.
